name: flowstream-root
description: An intelligent, low-latency collaborative project management engine.
author: Anuj Shrivastava

scripts.npm-build-prod: pnpm proto-gen && pnpm --filter backend db:generate && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.npm-deploy-prod: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter backend start
